/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/bat_test.dir/tests/bat_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bat_test.dir/src/math/Vector2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bat_test.dir/src/physics/Body2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bat_test.dir/src/physics/PhysicsWorld2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bat_test.dir/src/collision/Collision2D.cpp.o -o bat_test
